title: Local Variable Type Inference with var and Inheritance
description: A flowchart demonstrating the process of declaring a variable with 'var', its inferred type based on the constructor, and how method calls are resolved through inheritance at compile-time and run-time.
elements: At compile-time: Compiler checks methods against inferred type (SubClass)
At run-time: JVM creates SubClass object and executes overridden methods
relationships: Inferred type is used for all compile-time checks
Method resolution follows standard polymorphism rules based on the object's actual type at runtime
